title: brain enrich <note> [--apply] — --json success output
description: Model-authored synthesis enrichment of a single note. Non-mutating PREVIEW by default (emits the proposed ChangePlan + risk tier, no sinks written, no audit-ref event); --apply runs the tiered integration per workflow-risk-contract.md. Tier-1/2 auto-integrate via broker CAS (exit 0, applied); Tier-3 stops at review-pending (exit 6, success-shaped review_pending + runId). --dry-run + --apply together ⇒ exit 5. --yes never authorizes a privileged op. Thresholds per acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow.

allOf.description: A Tier-2 auto-integrated result MUST carry BOTH independently-typed confidence inputs (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow): a Tier-2 applied outcome cannot validate with either input absent — the min-reduction is fail-closed.

mode.description: preview = non-mutating proposal; applied = Tier-1/2 auto-integrated; review_pending = Tier-3 stopped at the review gate (exit 6).

modelConfidence.description: The generation model's self-reported confidence (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow modelConfidence); independently gated at >= 0.8.

validationConfidence.description: The deterministic validator's confidence (acceptance-thresholds.md §workflow validationConfidence); independently gated at >= 0.8. Tier-2 requires min(modelConfidence, validationConfidence) >= 0.8 — both must clear.

changedLines.description: Changed lines in the patch (gates Tier-2 at <= 50).

sections.description: Distinct sections of the single note touched (gates Tier-2 at <= 3).

plan.description: The proposed ChangePlan envelope (preview) — shape per @atlas/contracts ChangePlanEnvelopeSchema.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Synthesis enrichment of a note: non-mutating preview by default; --apply runs tiered integration (Tier-3 ⇒ review-pending, exit 6).

flags.description: Perform the mutation (tiered integration); without it, emit a non-mutating preview.
Caller-supplied idempotency key; a repeat --apply with the same key + request-hash (requestHashScope) returns the existing run rather than starting a duplicate (registry idempotency: key-accepting).

sideEffects: apply Tier-1/2: agent branch + worktree + commit, broker CAS integrate, finalizeLedgerWrite (run.integrated)
apply Tier-3: durable plan/branch/worktree/commit, stops at review-pending (run.planned)
prohibitedEffects: --yes never authorizes; whole-file rewrites impossible (ops-only patch)

errorCodes.when: unknown flag/argument, missing <note>, or --dry-run combined with --apply
the vault repo is missing or unreadable, or the note does not exist
the fail-closed backup watermark blocks a ledger-writing run
an egress/persisted artifact fails the fail-closed secret scan
the run is Tier-3 and stops at the review gate (success-shaped)
